title: Software Update - DFU is not available during a call
scenario: DFU is blocked with popup message when attempting to update firmware during an active call on Device Settings Software Update page
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect to a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Initiate or receive an active call on the device.
4. While on the active call, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
5. Tap on 'Software Update' (or 'Update') option in Device Settings.
6. Observe the popup message displayed on screen.
7. Tap 'OK' on the popup to dismiss it.
expected: The DFU (Device Firmware Update) should not start. A popup should appear with the message "Cannot update this device during a call". Tapping OK dismisses the popup and returns the user to the Software Update tab without initiating the update.
